title: Department Manager Vacancy at PC Jeweller - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at PC Jeweller - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, PC Jeweller in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About PC Jeweller:
PC Jeweller is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller!
